TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Paiwan Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://pwn.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_pwn, title = {Paiwan Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://pwn.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: minamilingan aicu "aljak na mazazangiljan a ti paisi ", mavan a milimilingan nua sedjerman i iyurupu (Europe) tua tja kakedriyan. a i sangasangasan a vinecikan aicu a milimilingan i tua sinansunatj nua madrusa a kaka a lja grimm (The Brothers Grimm) a minamilingan nua lja grimm (Grimms' Fairy Tales) ka 1812 a caviljan. sinanljavaran aicu a "Sneewittchen" nua i kakaian a djermany. == minamilingan ==
S.PHON: minami…≠iŇčan ai ¶u "a éak na mazazaŇči éan a ti paisi ", mavan a mi…≠imi…≠iŇčan nua s…ô…Č…ôrman i ijurupu (…ôurup…ô) tua ¶a kak…ô…Ėijan. a i saŇčasaŇčasan a vin…ô ¶ikan ai ¶u a mi…≠imi…≠iŇčan i tua sinansuna ¶ nua ma…Ėusa a kaka a éa grimm (th…ô bruth…ôrs grimm) a minami…≠iŇčan nua éa grimm (grimms Ē *airj ta…≠…ôs) ka **** a ¶avi éan. sinan éavaran ai ¶u a "sn…ô…ôwitt ¶h…ôn" nua i kakaian a …Č…ôrmanj. == minami…≠iŇčan ==
S.FORM: minamilingan aicu "aljak na mazazangiljan a ti paisi ", mavan a milimilingan nua sedjerman i iyurupu (Europe) tua tja kakedriyan. a i sangasangasan a vinecikan aicu a milimilingan i tua sinansunatj nua madrusa a kaka a lja grimm (The Brothers Grimm) a minamilingan nua lja grimm (Grimms' Fairy Tales) ka 1812 a caviljan. sinanljavaran aicu a "Sneewittchen" nua i kakaian a djermany. == minamilingan ==
S.PHON: minami…≠iŇčan ai ¶u "a éak na mazazaŇči éan a ti paisi ", mavan a mi…≠imi…≠iŇčan nua s…ô…Č…ôrman i ijurupu (…ôurup…ô) tua ¶a kak…ô…Ėijan. a i saŇčasaŇčasan a vin…ô ¶ikan ai ¶u a mi…≠imi…≠iŇčan i tua sinansuna ¶ nua ma…Ėusa a kaka a éa grimm (th…ô bruth…ôrs grimm) a minami…≠iŇčan nua éa grimm (grimms Ē *airj ta…≠…ôs) ka **** a ¶avi éan. sinan éavaran ai ¶u a "sn…ô…ôwitt ¶h…ôn" nua i kakaian a …Č…ôrmanj. == minami…≠iŇčan ==
